en: Then Zophar the Naamathite answered and said:
zh: 拿瑪人瑣法回答說：

en: "Should a multitude of words go unanswered, and a man full of talk be judged right?
zh: “這許多的話怎可不回答， 多嘴多舌的人怎能算為義呢？

en: Should your babble silence men, and when you mock, shall no one shame you?
zh: 你胡言亂語可使人不作聲嗎？ 你嘲笑的時候，無人責備嗎？

en: For you say, 'My doctrine is pure, and I am clean in God's eyes.'
zh: 你說：‘我的道理純全， 我在你眼前潔淨。’

en: But oh, that God would speak and open his lips to you,
zh: 但願 神說話， 願他開口跟你說話，

en: and that he would tell you the secrets of wisdom! For he is manifold in understanding. Know then that God exacts of you less than your guilt deserves.
zh: 把智慧的奧祕向你顯明， 因為真的智慧有兩面。 你當知道 神已忘記了你一部分的罪孽。

en: "Can you find out the deep things of God? Can you find out the limit of the Almighty?
zh: 神高深莫測之事你怎能查出呢？ 全能者的終極你怎能洞悉呢？

en: It is higher than heaven- what can you do? Deeper than Sheol- what can you know?
zh: 他的智慧高於諸天，你能作甚麼呢？ 比陰間還深，你怎能識透？

en: Its measure is longer than the earth and broader than the sea.
zh: 他的智慧比地長，比海寬。

en: If he passes through and imprisons and summons the court, who can turn him back?
zh: 他若過來把人囚禁， 召人受審，誰能阻止他呢？

en: For he knows worthless men; when he sees iniquity, will he not consider it?
zh: 因為他認識虛謊的人， 他看見欺詐，怎能不鑒察？

en: But a stupid man will get understanding when a wild donkey's colt is born a man!
zh: 虛妄的人悟出慧心， 就像野驢生子為人。

en: "If you prepare your heart, you will stretch out your hands toward him.
zh: 你若心裡歸向他， 又向他伸手禱告；

en: If iniquity is in your hand, put it far away, and let not injustice dwell in your tents.
zh: 你若遠遠地除掉你手裡的欺詐， 不讓不義居在你的帳棚裡；

en: Surely then you will lift up your face without blemish; you will be secure and will not fear.
zh: 那麼你必仰面，毫無愧色； 你也必堅定穩妥，無所懼怕。

en: You will forget your misery; you will remember it as waters that have passed away.
zh: 你必忘記你的苦楚， 回憶好像逝去的流水，

en: And your life will be brighter than the noonday; its darkness will be like the morning.
zh: 你們的人生必明亮如正午， 雖然黑暗仍像早晨。

en: And you will feel secure, because there is hope; you will look around and take your rest in security.
zh: 因為有指望，你必安穩， 你必四處巡查，安然睡覺。

en: You will lie down, and none will make you afraid; many will court your favor.
zh: 你躺臥，不受驚嚇， 必有很多人求你的情面。

en: But the eyes of the wicked will fail; all way of escape will be lost to them, and their hope is to breathe their last."
zh: 但惡人的眼目必昏花， 逃亡之路也必斷絕， 他們的指望就是最後的一口氣。”
